utterance: How many shots were taken in the game on December 19th?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE DATE(date) = '2023-12-19')
notes: Specific game date join via subquery. DATE(date) cast handles timestamp. 2023-12-19 = game_id 0022300362 (busiest game in dataset).

utterance: How many were made in that game?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE DATE(date) = '2023-12-19') AND made_flag = 1
notes: Turn 2: carries December 19 game forward. Adds made_flag = 1.

utterance: How many shots came from the game on October 30th?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE DATE(date) = '2023-10-30')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE DATE(date) = '2024-04-12')
notes: Turn 2: date swap to 2024-04-12 (game_id 0022301173). Tests implicit carryover of 'shots from game' pattern.

utterance: How many shots came from regular season games?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE season_type = 'Regular')
notes: season_type = 'Regular'. All shot_charts rows are regular season (002xxxxxxx). Verified: 7396.

utterance: Which regular season game had the most shot attempts?
gold_sql: SELECT g.game_id, g.date, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts sc JOIN games g ON sc.game_id = g.game_id WHERE g.season_type = 'Regular' GROUP BY g.game_id, g.date ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 1
notes: Turn 2: regular season filter carried; adds GROUP BY game + ORDER BY attempts. Finds busiest game.

utterance: How many shots in the most recent game in the dataset?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id = (SELECT game_id FROM games ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1)
notes: Bug 12 resolved: playoff shots (1593) now loaded. Most recent game = 0042300405 (2024-06-17, NBA Finals G5). Verified: 89 shots.

utterance: How many shots were there in games played in January 2024?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE DATE(date) BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-01-31')
notes: Month-scoped date range via BETWEEN. January 2024 window.

utterance: Which month had the most shot attempts?
gold_sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(g.date, 'YYYY-MM') as month, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts sc JOIN games g ON sc.game_id = g.game_id GROUP BY month ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 1
notes: TO_CHAR truncates date to month string. GROUP BY month then ORDER BY attempts. Tests date function in aggregation.

utterance: How many games were played in March 2024?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT game_id) FROM games WHERE DATE(date) BETWEEN '2024-03-01' AND '2024-03-31'
notes: COUNT DISTINCT game_id for March 2024 date window.

utterance: How many shots came from those March games?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE DATE(date) BETWEEN '2024-03-01' AND '2024-03-31')
notes: Turn 2: March 2024 date range carried forward via subquery join.

utterance: How many shots were taken in game 0022300362?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id = '0022300362'
notes: Direct game_id lookup. Tests NL use of explicit game_id string. Busiest game in dataset.

gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id = '0022300362' AND shot_type = '3PT Field Goal'
notes: Turn 2: game_id carried forward. Adds 3PT filter.

utterance: How many shots in games played in the first week of November 2023?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE DATE(date) BETWEEN '2023-11-01' AND '2023-11-07')
notes: 7-day window via BETWEEN. 'First week' maps to Nov 1-7.

utterance: How many distinct games did Jayson Tatum appear in?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT game_id) FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%')
notes: COUNT DISTINCT game_id filtered by player. Tests player + game context combination.

utterance: In how many of those games did he attempt at least 20 shots?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT game_id, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM shot_charts WHERE player_id = (SELECT player_id FROM players WHERE name ILIKE '%Jayson Tatum%') GROUP BY game_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 20) t
notes: Turn 2: 'those games' → Tatum games from Turn 1. Subquery aggregates per game then outer COUNT. Tests subquery-in-FROM pattern.

utterance: How many shots were taken in away games?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE game_id IN (SELECT game_id FROM games WHERE away_team ILIKE '%Boston%')
notes: Bug 13 resolved: home_team/away_team populated via MATCHUP parse. Corrected NL to 'away games' (clearer than 'against Boston opponents'). away_team ILIKE '%Boston%' = Celtics road games. Verified: 4349 shots in away games.

utterance: Which game had the highest shooting percentage?
gold_sql: SELECT g.game_id, g.date, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN sc.made_flag=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT)/COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts sc JOIN games g ON sc.game_id=g.game_id GROUP BY g.game_id, g.date ORDER BY fg_pct DESC LIMIT 1
notes: JOIN games for date context; GROUP BY game; ORDER BY FG% DESC; LIMIT 1. No opponent filter needed.
